chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 279 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 15.08.2024 Mr. Farhat Ali Bugti, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Manzoor Hussain Halepoto, Advocate for respondent No.3 along with Taj Muhammad Sohu, Town Officer and Qasim Raza Shah, Accounts Officer, Town Committee Kotdiji. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner, claiming to be employee of Taluka Municipal Administration in the capacity of Chowkidar, prays for releasing his outstanding as well as regular salaries through this petition. On the other hand, respondents, denying his employment with them, have furnished pay bill and acquaintance rolls of the permanent / temporary establishment of the Town Committee Kotdiji for the months of August 2017 and December 2018, wherein name of the petitioner does not reflect as their employee. This is a factual controversy, and we cannot decide it in the constitutional jurisdiction under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973; hence, this petition is dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to avail appropriate remedy by filing a Suit or any other remedy available to him in accordance with law, if he is so advised. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
